facts.fact: Vehicle recovery has self-recovery, like-recovery, and dedicated recovery levels.
facts.note: Disabling a tank is not always the same as destroying it.

facts.fact: Ordnance and maintenance determine how many vehicles return to service.
facts.note: Repair capacity is a tactical variable.

facts.fact: Army Service Forces also handled repair infrastructure.
facts.note: Repair depends on depot and transport depth.
